title: correction_finding.v1
description: FP-033 unified finding shape. Normalizes the deterministic detectors (run_deterministic_gates, geometry_sanity.audit, furniture_overlap_gate) AND visual_findings.v1 (FP-032) into ONE shape the correction loop routes on. `route` is filled by tools/finding_router.classify. No additionalProperties:false — detectors may carry extra provenance.

type.description: canonical finding type — the router's key (e.g. furniture_overlap, opening_host_mismatch, floating_door, global_visual)

source.description: which kind of detector produced it

source_check.description: the concrete detector/gate that emitted it (geometry_sanity, furniture_overlap_gate, opening_host, visual_oracle, ...)

suspected_owner.description: what likely owns the fix (builder, opening_routing, consensus, furniture_brain, soft_barrier_routing)
